attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
    STP4.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    STP4.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    STP4.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    STP4.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
    STP4.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
    STP4.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
    STP4.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
    STP4.PARTNER_COUNTRY,
    STP4.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY,
    STP4.DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
    STP4.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
    STP4.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
    COALESCE(RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,-999)  AS LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY,
    CASE 
      WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
        ELSE 'Y'
    END AS CHANNEL_FLG,
   STP4.AR_TRX_KEY,
   STP4.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   STP4.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_POS_DSF_PSPK STP4
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  RSH
  ON   STP4.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

SELECT 
   RPP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   RPP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   RPP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   SPK.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY    AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   EPK.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY    AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   CASE  WHEN CDW.BCF_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN CDW.BCF_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   WHEN COALESCE(PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 AND MT_SOLDTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
   THEN COALESCE(SHIP_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)
   ELSE COALESCE(PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)
   END AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
   CASE  WHEN CDW.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN CDW.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
   WHEN COALESCE(PS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) =-999 AND MT_SOLDTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
   THEN COALESCE(SHIP_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999)
   ELSE COALESCE(PS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) END AS PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   RPP.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRX_KEY,
   RPP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   RPP.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT AS BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  FROM  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_POS_PATTERNS RPP
  INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE_TV SPK
  ON  RPP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = SPK.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
   AND SPK.END_TV_DATE  = '3500-01-01'
  INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE_TV EPK
 ON  CASE WHEN RPP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE RPP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY END   = EPK.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
  AND  EPK.END_TV_DATE  = '3500-01-01'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS
  ON  SPK.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  AND  PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
  
  INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE_TV SHIPK
 ON RPP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = SHIPK.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
 AND SHIPK.END_TV_DATE  = '3500-01-01'
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  SHIP_TO_PARENT
 ON(SHIPK.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=SHIP_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY)
 AND SHIP_TO_PARENT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO MT_SOLDTO 
 ON MT_SOLDTO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = RPP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 
 LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CDW_PSPK CDW
 ON RPP.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT=CDW.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT

SELECT 
   RPP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   RPP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   RPP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   RPP.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   RPP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   RPP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
   RPP.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   COALESCE(PART_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') PARTNER_COUNTRY,
   COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY,
   RPP.AR_TRX_KEY,
   RPP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   RPP.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_POS_PARTNERS RPP
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT  NPLA.PARTY_KEY, NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
    FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR  NL
    ON  NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY
    AND  NL.SS_CODE IN ('CR','CR_MODS')
    AND  NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
    ON  NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY) PART_CTRY
  ON RPP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = PART_CTRY.PARTY_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT NPLA.PARTY_KEY, NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
    FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR  NL
    ON  NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY
    AND  NL.SS_CODE IN ('CR','CR_MODS')
    AND  NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
    ON  NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY) END_CTRY
  ON  RPP.dv_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = END_CTRY.PARTY_KEY

SELECT 
   NBM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
   ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
   ,NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
   ,CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   ,CBF.CHANNEL_FLG
   ,CBF.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG
   ,'POS' RTM_TYPE
   ,NBM.AR_TRX_KEY  
   ,CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
    FROM 
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NBM,
   $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHANNEL_REV_MONTH_CNTL CRD,
   $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_POS_PART_CBF CBF,
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS
   WHERE 
   NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CRD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  
   /*AND NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CRD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD */
   AND NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   AND NPOS.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = CBF.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   AND NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=CBF.AR_TRX_KEY
   AND 
   CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
   THEN -777
   ELSE COALESCE(NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
   END   =  CBF.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
     AND NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = CBF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	 AND NPOS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=CBF.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
	 AND NPOS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT=CBF.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
    AND NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')

SELECT 
  BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
  THEN -777
  ELSE COALESCE(NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
  END AS     DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  NBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
  BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NPOS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NBM
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHANNEL_REV_MONTH_CNTL CRD
  ON NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CRD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 
  /*AND NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CRD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD */
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS
  ON NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
  WHERE  NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD      IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')
  GROUP BY 
  BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
  DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  AR_TRX_KEY,
  BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,
  NPOS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT

SELECT
      STP3.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   STP3.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   STP3.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   STP3.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
   STP3.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   STP3.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
   STP3.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   STP3.PARTNER_COUNTRY,
   STP3.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY,
   COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
   CASE WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN -999 
        ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN -999 
       ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
       ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_COUNTRY = DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY THEN  PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
         ELSE CASE WHEN COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
           ELSE COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)
          END
        END
      END
    END 
   END AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
    CASE WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N' 
        ELSE  CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN 'N' 
      ELSE  CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 'N' 
         ELSE  CASE WHEN DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY = 'UNK' THEN  'N' 
            ELSE  CASE WHEN PARTNER_COUNTRY = DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY THEN  'N' 
               ELSE 'Y' 
              END
           END
        END
         END
   END AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
   STP3.AR_TRX_KEY,
   STP3.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   STP3.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHNL_POS_PT_CONTY STP3
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  (   
 SELECT  PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
 COALESCE(PS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT,-999) PARTY_ID,
 COALESCE(DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
 COALESCE (BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS,
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY PC
 WHERE  1=1
 AND  PS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY = PC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
 AND  PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
 AND  PC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ORDER BY PARTY_ID ASC) =1)  DSHIP
 ON STP3.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
 AND STP3.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY = DSHIP.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
